ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sponsorship_tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship tier */,
  "tier_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsorship tier (e.g., COMMUNITY, BRONZE, SILVER, GOLD) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sponsorship tier */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the sponsorship tier */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tier is currently available for purchase */,
  "max_companies" INTEGER /* Maximum number of companies that can purchase this tier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit (e.g., Job wall offers listed, 3 minutes to present the company during the break) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the benefit is currently available */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Category of the benefit (e.g., marketing, branding, networking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tier_benefits" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsorship tier */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benefit associated with the tier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id", "benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the company */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that purchased the sponsorship */,
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsorship tier purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the sponsorship was purchased */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sponsorship (e.g., pending, active, expired) */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the sponsorship */,
  "assigned_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who managed the sponsorship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("tier_id") REFERENCES sponsorship_tiers ("tier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_assigned_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsorship the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_sponsorship_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsorship_id") REFERENCES sponsorships ("sponsorship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged in */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date the user logged in */,
  "logout_date" TEXT /* Date the user logged out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)
